classifications.meaning: Potential core value requiring metadata review; not proven required or operational.
Potential optional core value requiring metadata review; not proven available.
Potential relevance depends on a named project and bounded human review.
Reference classification for investigation without operational use.
Reference classification for manual review only.
Potential artifact-oriented capability; availability and permission remain unverified.
Potential connected-account or sensitive-data access requires an exact future mission and separate approval process.
Potential broad control surface should be considered only after narrower structured alternatives.
Unproven material suitable only for isolated future research.
Potential overlap requires manual comparison before any future choice.
Identity or permission facts are too opaque for consideration.
Material is excluded from use unless a future, independently authorized review changes disposition.

risk_considerations.unknown_consequence: Repository contents may be exposed beyond the intended review boundary.
risk_considerations.review_expectation: Confirm exact repository and read scope.

risk_considerations.unknown_consequence: Files, branches, or metadata may be mutated.
risk_considerations.review_expectation: Require exact write paths, rollback, and human authorization.

risk_considerations.unknown_consequence: Existing signed-in sessions may expose private account state.
risk_considerations.review_expectation: Require an exact mission and bounded session purpose.

risk_considerations.unknown_consequence: Private communications, schedules, and stored files may be accessed or changed.
risk_considerations.review_expectation: Require exact account, data, action, and duration boundaries.

risk_considerations.unknown_consequence: Data may leave the local host or external systems may be contacted.
risk_considerations.review_expectation: Document destinations, data classes, and allowed actions.

risk_considerations.unknown_consequence: Third-party account data may be read, correlated, or changed.
risk_considerations.review_expectation: Apply least privilege and exact mission review.

risk_considerations.unknown_consequence: Broad interaction may act outside a structured tool boundary.
risk_considerations.review_expectation: Prefer narrower structured surfaces; treat broad control as last resort.

risk_considerations.unknown_consequence: Host configuration and future capability surface may change.
risk_considerations.review_expectation: This baseline grants no installation or enablement authority.

risk_considerations.unknown_consequence: A plugin may perform externally visible or destructive actions.
risk_considerations.review_expectation: Separate invocation from action approval; this baseline grants neither.

risk_considerations.unknown_consequence: Credentials may be exposed, persisted, or misused.
risk_considerations.review_expectation: Do not supply secrets under this baseline; require a separate authorized control design.
